title: End Bastion
description: This Datapack generates new bastion variants in the end
body:
-------**Explorer Maps**--------

You can find from a End city these maps:
- You can find the **End Treasure Bastion explorer map**
- You can find the **End Bridge Bastion explorer map**
- every 2-3 End city has a **Explorer map**
  ![Explorer maps](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d174bf8d0dcee8eddc6043ab24f28936ecc8b9a.png)
